title: Mukti corpus case
description: One Bijoy/SutonnyMJ -> Unicode conversion test case.

features.description: Linguistic feature tags for per-feature scoring, e.g. reph, pre-base-reorder, ya-phala, virama, khanda-ta, nukta, chandrabindu, dari.

source.description: Code points the converter receives (Bijoy/SutonnyMJ ANSI bytes as code points). Authoritative input.

expected.description: Correct Unicode Bengali output. MUST be NFC.

ref.description: Justification anchor: a GROUND-TRUTH.md reference or 'maintainer-verified'.
